name: UseZombie
description: Agent Delivery Control Plane — long-lived, event-driven autonomous workers (Zombies) scoped to a workspace.

operations.description: Provision a new Zombie in the given workspace. Returns the zombie_id used for subsequent operations.

Partial update of a Zombie. Body fields are optional and presence-based: config_json (replace config) and/or status ("active" to resume, "stopped" to halt, "killed" to mark terminal). The 'paused' state is platform-only — anomaly-gate auto-halt — and rejected here.

Hard-delete a Zombie and cascade its history (events, telemetry, sessions, approval gates, memory entries). Precondition: status='killed' — kill the zombie before deleting. Returns 204 on success, 409 if not yet killed.
Post a chat message to a running Zombie's loop.
List the Zombie's event history with pagination.
Server-Sent Events stream of new events as they arrive.

Deliver an inbound event to a Zombie. Body must be HMAC-SHA256 signed with the workspace credential matching the Zombie's trigger.source (e.g. vault row zombie:github, field webhook_secret); the provider-specific signature header is verified upstream. Idempotent within 24h via event_id.

revenue.description: Users supply their own LLM API keys. UseZombie bills per agent-second. Never stores LLM costs.
